title: Fourth battle of Suurja

{{Quote|This shows that the cordon that Captain [Saul] Karath has thrown up is holding. It's only a matter of time before we begin pushing in the other direction.|Catronus Steffans, regarding this and other battles on Suurja|<ref name="taris" />}}
During the [[Mandalorian Wars]] in [[3964 BBY]], a '''battle''' occurred at the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Suurja]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders/Legends|Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders]]. As the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]] advanced toward the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]], [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Saul Karath]] attempted to halt their advance at the [[Jebble-Vanquo-Tarnith line]], where Suurja was located. [[First battle of Suurja|Three]] [[Second battle of Suurja|previous]] [[Third battle of Suurja|clashes]] at Suurja within the last six [[Standard week/Legends|weeks]] were inconclusive—in a similar fashion, the battle also ended without a clear victor. Afterward, both sides retired from the [[Suurja system/Legends|Suurja system]].

==Prelude==
In [[3964 BBY]],<ref name="kotor0" /> during the early [[Standard day/Legends|days]] of the [[Mandalorian Wars]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders/Legends|Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders]],<ref name="taris" /> [[Mandalore the Ultimate]], [[Mandalore (title)/Legends|leader]] of the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]], set his sights on the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]].<ref name="nec">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> Starting at the fringes of known [[Realspace/Legends|space]], the Mandalorian advance met with success, forcing [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Saul Karath]] to throw up a defensive cordon in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] known as the [[Jebble-Vanquo-Tarnith line]]. Heavy fighting occurred along the barrier, and four [[Standard month/Legends|months]] after the Mandalorian [[Battle of Flashpoint Station|capture]] of the [[Flashpoint Stellar Research Station]], the Mandalorians decided to attack one of the [[Planet/Legends|worlds]] on the line, [[Suurja]]. Over the next few [[Standard week/Legends|weeks]], Suurja, an [[Agriworld/Legends|agriworld]] with about 16 million colonists, was the host of [[First battle of Suurja|three]] [[Second battle of Suurja|inconclusive]] [[Third battle of Suurja|battles]]. Although the two sides had already been fighting over Suurja for a period of about six weeks, both the Republic and the Mandalorians were still strong enough to continue.<ref name="taris" />

==The battle==
Captain Karath led Republic [[Navy/Legends|naval]] forces again in opposition to the Mandalorians. The battle was witnessed, and later reported on, by several [[Journalist/Legends|journalists]] embedded with the Republic Navy. However, much like the previous three battles, there was no clear victor.<ref name="taris" />

==Aftermath==
Following the fourth battle at Suurja, both sides retired from the [[Suurja system/Legends|Suurja system]]. In the immediate aftermath, reports of provisioning problems with the Republic [[Troop/Legends|troops]] on Suurja surfaced, despite a recent levy to keep them better supplied. Soon after the end of the fourth battle, it and the other three skirmishes were reported upon in an [[The Taris Holofeed: Prime Edition|edition]] of the [[Taris Holofeed]] news report from the nearby world [[Taris/Legends|Taris]]. In the release, Republic defense official [[Catronus Steffans]] was quoted as optimistically saying that the stalemate at Suurja represented a success of Karath's defensive cordon, and that it heralded an upcoming Republic pushback.<ref name="taris" />

==Behind the scenes==
The fourth battle of Suurja garnered its first, and thus far only, mention in ''[[The Taris Holofeed: Prime Edition]]'', a short postscript to the [[2006]] [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] [[Knights of the Old Republic 0|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 0]]. A short summary of this and other battles of Suurja is given, written by [[John Jackson Miller]], in the style of an [[in-universe]] news report.<ref name="taris" />
